feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Cognitive dispersion in established adulthood: etiology and implications for cognitive aging
entry.content:
Authors: ..., NP Friedman, R Plomin,SJ Wadsworth... - Innovation in Aging, 2026

Abstract: Background and Objectives Cognitive dispersion, reflecting intraindividual variability across tasks, may signal dementia risk in older adults, but its origins and relevance before midlife are unclear. We examined dispersion as a potential marker of ...

Alert: SJ Wadsworth (keyword alert)

entry.title: Analyzing trends in prebiotics, probiotics and synbiotics applications in finfish aquaculture with an insight from a bibliometric study

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Das, S Ghosh, S Saha, NC Saha, K Ghosh - Critical Insights in Aquaculture, 2026

Abstract: ... To date, no bibliographic study has exclusively examined the effects of probiotic, prebiotic , or synbiotic supplementation on growth, feed ... Furthermore, techniques such as encapsulation and co-treatment should be explored to maximize the efficacy ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Changes in HMO profiles: from biochemical evidence to clinical considerations

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: A Consales, ML Giannì, C Agostoni - Pediatric Research, 2026

Abstract: ... HMOs exert multiple well-established biological functions in the lactating infant, including shaping the gut microbiota through their prebiotic , bifidogenic activity, providing antimicrobial anti-adhesive effects, enhancing intestinal barrier integrity ...
